user.title: Set up Garden Irrigation
user.description: Select the weather entity used for forecasts (temperature factor and rain veto). Everything else — circuits, notifications, tuning — is configured afterwards via the integration's Configure dialog.

abort.already_configured: Already configured — only one hub is supported.

data.regen_sensor: Rain sensor, mm over the last 24 h (optional)
data.notaus_minuten: Emergency-stop threshold (must exceed every max duration)

benachrichtigungen.title: Notifications
benachrichtigungen.description: Comma-separated notify services, e.g. `notify.mobile_app_phone1, notify.mobile_app_phone2`. Leave empty for no push messages.

tuning.title: Tuning
tuning.description: All defaults come from the proven 4-circuit reference system. Score weights are normalized to their sum.

data.strahlung_schwelle: Pot dosing peak-sun lockout (unit of your sensor)

data.name: Circuit name
data.bodensensoren: Soil moisture sensors (optional, several = minimum wins)
data.parallel: Run in parallel with other circuits

data.veto_schwelle: Soil veto threshold (moist enough above this)
data.k_faktor: Dose response k (%-points per minute at 50 % soil)

data.name: Circuit name
data.parallel: Run in parallel with other circuits

jetzt_bewaessern.name: Water now
jetzt_bewaessern.description: Starts the planned watering run immediately (skip/vacation vetoes still apply).

not_aus.name: Emergency stop
not_aus.description: Cancels the run and closes all valves with retries.

plan_neu_berechnen.name: Recompute plan
plan_neu_berechnen.description: Recomputes score and today's duration for all zones immediately (incl. pot check).

dosis_geben.name: Give dose
dosis_geben.description: Triggers an immediate pot dose (bypasses score gates, keeps the safety basics).

kreis.name: Zone
kreis.description: Zone ID of the pot zone (e.g. tomaten).
